#  Specifications (Android) 
Table of Contents 
##  Overview 
The Specifications tool enables you to manage and archive all specs and revisions to ensure that the project team members always work off of the specs with real-time access. You can access the current set of specifications from your mobile device in the field or from the office computer.
  * Upload your specifications quickly by using Optical Character Recognition (OCR) to fill in information in a timely manner
  * View Spec Section PDFs on demand
  * Find keywords with contextual search
  * Make edits in bulk
  * Automatically save all revisions


**Quick Links**
  * [Specifications Tool Courses](https://learn.procore.com/page/courses-by-tool#procore-tool%5Fspecifications-tool)
  * [Procore Certification Courses](https://learn.procore.com/page/procore-certification-all-courses#procore-tool%5Fspecifications-tool)
  * [Procore Community Specifications Discussions](https://community.procore.com/s/global-search/specifications)
title: Overview
description: This is the landing page for support articles about the Project level Specifications tool on Android devices. It contains links to tutorials and other support documentation related to Specifications.
